name: ocean-clouds
description: Find maritime job vacancies for all seafarer ranks — scrapes job boards, company portals, and Telegram channels. Built for the ocean-clouds project.

skills.name: search
skills.description: Search all maritime job sources (boards + Telegram). Args: [rank] [vessel_type] [region]

skills.name: tg
skills.description: Fetch latest job posts from configured Telegram maritime groups and channels

skills.name: filter
skills.description: Filter job results by rank, vessel type, or region. Args: --rank --vessel --region --salary

skills.name: sources
skills.description: List and manage all configured job sources (sites and Telegram channels)
